name: Baked Vidalia Onions
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove a thin slice from both ends of the onion.
2. Quarter the onion lengthwise.
3. Place the onions in an oiled baking dish/pan.
4. Brush with olive oil and salt lightly.
5. Cover with aluminum foil if the dish does not have its own cover.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes, or until tender.
7. Remove the cover.
8. Brush again with olive oil and sprinkle with vinegar.
9. Bake for an additional 45 to 50 minutes, turning onions several times and basting with oil.
